summary: Tighten the `bid-rules` parent command's Short description so agents know work happens on the `apply` subcommand.
reason: The parent was described as 'Plan conditional bid changes from a rules file' even though it is a no-op without `apply`. Agents introspecting `--help` could try invoking the parent and get the no-subcommand error instead of the actual planner.
validated_outcome: Manual `--help` confirms the parent surfaces 'use the `apply` subcommand to plan or apply'; no behavioral change.
